testcase.name: interp 5
testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: "...{ x0(0) = 1 [x0(1) = x0(1) + x0(1) val x1 = x0(0) if (x1 == 0) { x0(0) = 1 x0(1) = x0(1) + x0(1) } if (x1 == 1) { x0(0) = 2 if (x0(1) == 0) { x0(0) = 0 } } val x2 = x0(0) if (x2 == 0) { x0(0) = 1 x0(1) = x0(1) + x0(1) } if (x2 == 1) { x0(0) = 2 if (x0(1) == 0) { x0(0) = 0 } } val x3 = x0(0) if (x3 == 0) { x0(0) = 1 x0(1) = x0(1) + x0(1) } if (x3 == 1) { x0(0) = 2 if (x0(1) == 0) { x0(0) = 0 }] } x0 } } ..." did not equal "...{ x0(0) = 1 [val x1 = x0(1) + x0(1) x0(1) = x1 x0(0) = 2 if (x1 == 0) { x0(0) = 0] } x0 } } ..." testcase.name: simplify 5
testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: "...0 x0(1) = 1 [if (x0(0) == 0) { x0(0) = 1 } if (x0(0) == 1) { x0(0) = 2 } if (x0(0) == 2) { x0(0) = 3 }] x0 } } /*****..." did not equal "...0 x0(1) = 1 [x0(0) = 3] x0 } } /*****..." src/out/interp_5s.check.scala at org.scalatest.Assertions.newAssertionFailedException(Assertions.scala:528) at
